title: ilex theezans var. fertilis
intro: Ilex theezans var. fertilis, also known as the Korean holly, is a plant species within the Ilex genus, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing oxidative stress, and potentially inhibiting the growth of certain cancer cells. In herbal preparations, Ilex theezans var. fertilis is often consumed as a tea, taken in capsule or tablet form, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
